lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Gnosi
lines.text: My name is Gnosi. I am here to assist the Varrock Museum in their research.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I didn't know the Varrock Museum was familiar with this continent. What research are you conducting?

lines.speaker: Gnosi
lines.text: We're studying the history of the region, origins of the lizardmen and how it all connects to Xeric.

lines.speaker: Gnosi
lines.text: We've wanted to study this place for a while, but haven't been able to explore due to lizardmen blocking the way.

lines.speaker: Gnosi
lines.text: But now that the Shayzien Army have cleared the path and discovered the Chambers of Xeric in the process, there is much to explore!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who is Xeric?

lines.speaker: Gnosi
lines.text: Xeric was an incredibly powerful dark mage. He ruled Great Kourend for ten decades.

lines.speaker: Gnosi
lines.text: If you'd like to find out more you should visit the Historical Archive at the Grand Library.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are the Chambers of Xeric?

lines.speaker: Gnosi
lines.text: At the summit of this mountain we've found an ancient temple and a vast network of caves that we believe were formed by Xeric and his followers.

lines.speaker: Gnosi
lines.text: The discovery of the Chambers tells us Xeric invested significant time and resources here, yet it was never documented.

lines.speaker: Gnosi
lines.text: While much of Kourend's history under Xeric remains unknown, it is very surprising to discover such a huge area that was previously undiscovered to us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I explore the Chambers?

lines.speaker: Gnosi
lines.text: Of course, though be careful. The dangers of the Chambers of Xeric are as yet unknown. You should take a strong group of companions with you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you think Xeric used this area for?

lines.speaker: Gnosi
lines.text: When he ruled Kourend, we know Xeric performed experiments on the living, using power drawn from the Dark Altar. After he was overthrown, he would have needed a new source of power.

lines.speaker: Gnosi
lines.text: We believe he came here to seek it. Xeric would also have required a source of many creatures for these experiments, and the Chambers certainly contain many of those!

lines.speaker: Gnosi
lines.text: He must have also had some form of teleportation in order to reach the temple unnoticed.

lines.speaker: Gnosi
lines.text: With time and careful study we will uncover these secrets and be able to answer these questions.

lines.speaker: Gnosi
lines.text: We believe this altar is that source. It seems to act as an amplifier for the Dark Altar.

lines.speaker: Gnosi
lines.text: As for what he used the Chambers for, that we still don't know. There's a lot of creatures in the Chambers. Maybe he used them in his experiments.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

sections.title: After completion of Tale of the Righteous

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. How's it going?

lines.speaker: Gnosi
lines.text: The discovery of this cave could change everything. We might finally be able to discover the link between the lizardmen, the Chambers of Xeric and Xeric himself.
